reference: Hello. I have a quick question. I have been experiencing nausea for several days, diarrhea, and body chills and aches. Then yesterday, out of nowhere, I felt great. However, this morning when I woke up, I had the same symptoms plus swelling in the opening at the back of my throat where the nasal passage connects. Is this mononucleosis?
text: Hello, I have a quick question. I have been feeling very nauseous for several days, diarrhea, and body aches and pains. Then yesterday, out of nowhere, I felt great. However, this morning when I woke up, I had the same symptoms plus swelling in the opening at the back of my throat where the nasal passage connects. Is this mononucleosis?
